item.TDLINE: 1.Kindly maintain DelVal item codes and purchase order numbers on your
2.In case of any discrepancies, please contact DelVal USA Office.If no
response is received within the next 48 hours, we will consider this ,,
3.This is an electronic PO copy. No signature is required.
